name: getTimeline
description: Return all stored timeline periods for the current channel. Always fetch fresh from the database. Use this as the first step when exploring conversation history — it provides period summaries with start/end timestamps. Pass those timestamps to getHistory for detailed rows, or use them to scope a getInformation keyword search.

limit.description: Optional maximum number of periods to return (most recent first, then re-ordered ascending).

order.description: Order periods by start_idx ascending (default) or descending.
